reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
평소에 양치는 손으로만 했었는데,
바잇미 x 히끄 칫솔은 거부감이 덜해서 계속 칫솔로 양치해보고 있어요. 며칠 아침 저녁으로 꾸준히 사용해주었는데 구취도 줄어서 만족합니다!

*양치질을 싫어하는 고양이들은 손으로 이를 만지고 간식 주는 놀이부터 해주세요! 차근차근 해주어야 양치하는 갓냥이가 될 수 있어요 🫶🏻
reviews.content_en:
I used to only brush my cat's teeth by hand, but with BITE ME x HICK toothbrush, there's much less resistance, so I'm continuing to brush regularly. After using it consistently for a few days, morning and night, the bad breath has also decreased and I'm very satisfied! 

*For cats that hate brushing, start by playing with their teeth using your hand and giving treats! You need to go step by step to raise a good kitty brusher 🫶🏻

reviews.name: 우****
reviews.content:
양쪽이라 좋아요 이빨 안 좋은 애라서 피가 매번 났는데
솔이부들부들 여리고 작아서 좋네요 양치 또 시키러 가야지..
reviews.content_en: I like that it has both sizes! My cat has bad teeth and would bleed every time, but the bristles are soft and small, which is great. Gotta brush again soon..

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
칫솔모가 억세지도 막 부드럽지도 않은,적당한 칫솔모라 양치가 더 잘되는 느낌이에요.
칫솔 하나에 두 헤드가 결합되어 있어 매우 활용적이라
편하고 칫솔대 그립감도 최고입니다.
치약도 애들이 츄르인줄 아는지 핥아 먹고...기호성 좋으네요.
사용해보니 바잇미가 고심해서 만든게 확 와닿아요.
집사도 만족하고 냥이도 만족하는 치카푸X데일리냥치 추천합니다.
reviews.content_en: The bristle firmness is just right—not too stiff, not too soft—so brushing feels more effective. Since one toothbrush has two heads combined, it's very versatile and convenient, plus the grip is excellent. The toothpaste is also great—the cats lick it thinking it's a treat tube, so they really like the taste. After using it, you can really feel how much thought BITE ME put into making this. Highly recommend CHICAPU x DAILY MEOW BRUSH—both the owner and the kitty are satisfied!

reviews.name: 냥사원 티모
reviews.content:
🧡냥사원 솔직리뷰🧡
안녕하세요! 9살 냥사원 최티모에요! 저는 치주염을 앓고 있어서 더욱 양치를 자주 해야하는데, 잇몸과 이가 약해서 딱딱한 칫솔모는 자꾸 피가 나고ㅠㅠ 뫼비우스의 띠처럼 계속 피와 양치와 치주염의 연속이었답니닷....ㅜ 그래서 다양한 칫솔과 치약들을 써보면서 쌓인 경험이 치카푸 듀얼헤드 칫솔을 만드는 데에 큰 도움이 됐대요! 
특히 이 듀얼헤드가 너무 좋더라 작은 헤드로는 어금니 안쪽까지도 깨끗하게 닦을 수 있고 큰 헤드로도 쓱쓱 닦아낼 수 있어서 집사도 저도 편해요! 고양이 전용치약 데일리냥치와 치카푸 듀얼헤드로 양치전쟁에서 해방되세요!!
reviews.content_en:
🧡Cat Employee Honest Review🧡
Hello! I'm Choi Timmo, a 9-year-old cat employee! I have periodontitis so I need to brush more frequently, but since my gums and teeth are weak, hard bristles keep making me bleed ㅠㅠ It was like a Möbius strip—just an endless cycle of bleeding, brushing, and periodontitis... So all the experience from trying various toothbrushes and toothpastes really helped in creating the CHICAPU dual head toothbrush!
I absolutely love this dual head! The small head lets me clean all the way into the back molars, and the large head sweeps smoothly too, so my human and I are both comfortable! With cat-specific toothpaste DAILY MEOW BRUSH and CHICAPU dual head, say goodbye to the brushing wars!!

reviews.name: l****
reviews.content: 칫솔이 커서 시원시원하게 잘 닦이네요 큰 칫솔은 전체적으로 닦고 작은 칫솔은 어금니 닦을때 아주 좋아요 치약도 투명한 겔타입이라 거부하지않고 잘 닦네요 매일매일 닦아줘도 약간의 치석이 있는데 효과좀 봤으면 좋겠어요
reviews.content_en: The toothbrush is large and cleans really well and thoroughly. The big brush is great for overall cleaning and the small one is perfect for the back teeth. The toothpaste is a clear gel type so there's no resistance and it cleans well. Even brushing every day, there's still some tartar buildup, so I hope to see more noticeable results.

reviews.name: 알토
reviews.content:
🧡개사원 솔직리뷰🧡 
제가 덴탈껌과 수제간식에 의존하며 양치질에 게을렀던 죄로 첫째는 스케일링, 발치 등 눈물나는 치료를 진행했어요. 돈도 정말 어마무시하게 깨졌지만, 아픈데 말도 못하고 지낸 우리 개가 너무 불쌍하고 죄책감이 정말 많이 들었습니다.ㅠㅠ 이후로 첫째랑 둘째 모두 매일매일 덴탈케어를 해주느라 안 써본 칫솔/치약이 없다고 정말 자부합니다! 신제품이라면 펀딩/펫페어 등 가리지 않고 쓸어와 일단 써보는 타입인데요, 지금 남아있는 칫솔들은 사진과 같아요! 말이 많은 편이라, 하나씩 장단점을 설명하고 당당하게 치카푸 듀얼헤드 추천하도록 하겠습니다.

1. 어린이용 칫솔 : 적당한 탄성과 사이즈로 이빨이 큰 첫째에게 주로 사용합니다. 칫솔모가 좀 길고 부드러워서 마찰력 부분에서는 좀 떨어져요.
2. 초미세모 칫솔 : 이전에 타 브랜드 미세모를 펀딩으로 구매했었는데, 양치질이 잘 안되는건 둘째치고 칫솔 헤드가 뽁 하고 빠졌..(ㅠㅠ) 양치 후 2차 정리/잇몸 마사지 용도로 사용하고 있어요. 마찰력이 없어 단독사용 안되고 깨끗하게 닦아도 왠지 찜찜합니다. 넘 빽빽ㅠㅠ
3. 포인트 칫솔 : 저렴한 가격이라 여러개 사서 빨리 갈아줍니다. 얇은만큼 빨리 헤지거든요. 이빨이 작은 둘째 어금니 공략용입니다. 기존에 쓰던건 저렴하지만 길이가 길어서 좀 애를 먹었어요.
4. 일반 칫솔 : 동물병원에서 살 수 있는 그런 칫솔은 유혈사태가 잦고 딱딱하고 아파해서 손절했습니다. 사이즈도 그렇고 비추에요...

이외에 아주 작은 칫솔, 짱큰 왕타칫솔, 적당한 인간칫솔 등등 수도 없이 여러 칫솔을 돌려써가며 양치 장인이 되어가고 있지만 항상 어딘가 가려운... 2% 부족한 상태였습니다.  

그리고 대망의 치카푸 듀얼헤드! 좋은점만 말하고 싶지만 솔직하게 써보겠습니다. 진짜 좋은 점은 바로바로 가장 ✨적당한 탄성✨!! 모 두께랑 길이, 배열 모든게 이렇게 완벽한 조합일 수가 없습니다. 마찰력이 좋아서 치태 제거에 가장 효과적이고, 2주 이상 거의 매일 사용해보니 치석이 눈에 띄게 줄어들더라고요! 양치는 결국 깨끗이빨을 위한 거니까, 이 부분에서 진짜진짜 만족했습니다. 그렇다고 피가 나는 딱딱뾰족모 XXX 또 이 헤드 사이즈가 입이 작고 삼각 구조인 고양이/소형견 친구들에게 아주 알맞습니다. 너무 작은 칫솔은 오래 걸리고 불편하더라고요ㅠㅠ 이거는 어금니+a 길이라 진짜 딱 좋아요. 진짜 그냥 완전 찰떡... 추가로 좋은 점은 이 혁신적인 차세대 디자인인!! 슥삭슥삭하고 바로 슉 뒤집어서 쓰면 편해요. 게다가 툭 내려놔도 바닥에 칫솔모가 닿지 않아 찝찝함도 훨씬 덜합니다. 안 끈적거리고 기호성 짱인 데일리냥치랑 같이 쓰면, 💝2% 꽉 채워지고도 남는 완벽한 양치시간💝 안녕!
reviews.content_en:
🧡Dog Employee Honest Review🧡
I was lazy with brushing and relied on dental chews and homemade treats, so my first pup had to go through heartbreaking treatments like scaling and extractions. The vet bills were absolutely devastating, and I felt so guilty seeing my poor dog suffer in pain without being able to say anything ㅠㅠ After that, I've given both my first and second pup dental care every single day—I'm confident I've tried every toothbrush and toothpaste out there! If there's a new product, I don't care if it's crowdfunding or pet fairs, I just grab it and try it. Here's what I have left! I tend to talk a lot, so let me explain the pros and cons of each and confidently recommend CHICAPU dual head.

1. Kids' toothbrush: Good elasticity and size, mainly use for my first pup who has large teeth. The bristles are a bit long and soft, so friction isn't the best.
2. Ultra-fine bristle brush: I funded a different brand's fine bristle before, but brushing wasn't effective, plus the head popped right off (ㅠㅠ) I use it now for secondary cleaning and gum massage after brushing. With no friction, it can't be used alone and even when I clean well, something feels off. Too dense ㅠㅠ
3. Point toothbrush: Cheap price so I buy several and replace them frequently since they wear out quickly. Good for my second pup's small back teeth. The one I used before was cheap but the length was long, which was annoying.
4. Regular toothbrush: The kind you can buy at animal hospitals causes bleeding easily, is hard, and causes pain, so I threw it out. Size-wise, not recommended...

Besides, I've rotated through countless toothbrushes—tiny ones, huge ones, regular human-size ones—and I'm becoming a brushing master, but there was always that lingering feeling of something missing... that 2% gap.

And then came the long-awaited CHICAPU dual head! I want to only say good things, but let me be honest. The truly great thing is the ✨perfect elasticity✨!! The bristle thickness, length, arrangement—it's such a perfect combination. The friction is excellent so it's most effective at removing plaque, and after using it almost daily for over 2 weeks, the tartar visibly decreased! Brushing is ultimately about clean teeth, so I was really, really satisfied with this. And unlike hard, pointy bristles that cause bleeding XXX this head size is perfect for cats and small dogs with small mouths and triangular structures. Too small a brush takes forever and is inconvenient ㅠㅠ This one is just the right length for back teeth and more. Honestly, just perfect... Plus the innovative next-gen design is amazing! You can swish-swash and flip it right over to use, and even if you drop it, the bristles don't touch the floor so there's much less of that icky feeling. Combined with non-sticky, highly palatable DAILY MEOW BRUSH, you get 💝a perfect brushing time that fills that 2% gap and then some💝 Goodbye!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
여기저기 고양이칫솔을 알아보는 중 칫솔모가 여러모양이 있었는데 마침 이 제품은 듀얼헤드여서 작고 소중한 앞니부터 안쪽 송곳니까지 한 칫솔로 구석구석 케어를 할 수 있을 것 같아요!😬
닭고기향나는 치약덕분에 첫 치카인데도 맛있어서 잘 참네요(?)ㅎㅎㅎ
아직은 잘못하지만 열심히 연습하려구요!!ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
I was looking around at cat toothbrushes and saw various bristle shapes, and this product happens to be dual head, so I think I can care for everything from small, precious front teeth to the inside canines with just one brush! 😬
Thanks to the chicken-flavored toothpaste, even though it's my first brushing, it tastes good so my kitty tolerates it well (?) ㅎㅎㅎ
Still not doing it perfectly but I'm practicing hard!! ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 6개월 냥이 두마리 각각 칫솔 치약 한개씩 사드렸습니다. 치약 향이 닭가슴살 향이라서 그런가 처음하는 양치질인데도 거부감없이 굉장히 호의적이었어요! 앞으로 양치질은 걱정없이 할 수 있을거 같아요. 요즘 냥이 제품을 바잇미에서 사고있는데 너무 좋아용..
reviews.content_en: I got two 6-month-old cats each their own toothbrush and toothpaste. The toothpaste smells like chicken breast, so even though it was their first time brushing, they were very receptive with no resistance at all! I think brushing will be worry-free from now on. These days I'm buying cat products from BITE ME and they're so good...

reviews.name: I****
reviews.content: 애긴데 치약 적응 해야한다해서 히끄가 쓰는  치약을 3개월 반 인생 첫 치약으로 정했어요 이게 뭐라고 간식인줄 알고 먹네요ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My cat is young, so I was told she needs to adapt to toothpaste, and I chose HICK's toothpaste as her very first toothpaste at 3.5 months old. But she thinks it's a treat and just eats it ㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
이번년 목표는 매일매일 양치 해주기!
그전에 쓰던 칫솔모도 작다고 생각했는데 더 작아서 그런지 고양이가 그나마 좀 가만히 있어줘요..^^
하지만 다른 고양이처럼 치약을 맛있게? 먹는다거나.. 하진 않네요ㅠ 닭가슴살 짱 좋아해서 기대했는데ㅠ 하지만 냄새맡고 도망가진 않더라고요! 그전엔 도망가는거 잡아와서 양치했는데ㅋㅋ 이정도만으로도 아주 만족합니다 ^^
겸사겸사 강아지도 같이 양치하는데 강아지는 좋아해요.. 저희집 강쥐는 뭔들안좋아할까 싶지만..ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
This year's goal is to brush daily!
I thought the toothbrush bristles from before were small, but these are even smaller, so my cat at least sits still a bit more now..^^
But unlike other cats, she doesn't find the toothpaste delicious or anything... ㅠ I was hoping since she loves chicken breast so much ㅠ But she doesn't run away when she smells it! Before, I had to catch her and drag her back to brush ㅋㅋ I'm very satisfied with just this improvement ^^
As a bonus, my dog brushes too and she likes it.. I wonder what my pup wouldn't like though ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 마침 칫솔 교체 시기가 되어서 여러개 사봤어요.. 냥이들이 데일리냥치 치약을 너무 잘 쓰고 있는데 이 칫솔도 잘 써줬으면 좋겠네요 :) 듀얼 헤드라 양치할 때 칫솔을 따로 두개씩 준비하지 않아도 되어서 너무 맘에 들어요!
reviews.content_en: It was time to replace the toothbrush, so I tried a few different ones. My kitties are using DAILY NYANGCHI toothpaste really well, and I hope they'll use this toothbrush just as much :) I love that it has a dual head so I don't have to prepare two separate toothbrushes when brushing their teeth!

reviews.name: 랑****
reviews.content: 첫째가 구내염으로 너무 고생했던 애라서,,, 미리미리 관리해주고자 신경쓰고 있습니다. 여러 칫솔 써봤지만 가성비 정말 좋고 뒤쳐지지 않네요. 계속 써보고 좋으면 또 구매하려 합니다！
reviews.content_en: My first one suffered a lot from stomatitis, so I've been trying to manage it early on. I've tried several toothbrushes, but this one has really great value for money and doesn't fall behind at all. I'll continue using it and buy more if it works well!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 끈적거리거나 향이 강하지 않아서 마음에 들어요. 고양이도 맛있게 잘 핥아 먹습니다. (그렇다고 양치질을 좋아하진 않지만요…) 꾸준히 관리하면 좋을 것 같아서 열심히 해주고 있어요!
reviews.content_en: I like that it's not sticky and doesn't have a strong flavor. My cat licks it up deliciously too. (Though that doesn't mean she likes brushing... 😅) I've been brushing diligently since consistent care should help!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 우선 양끝에 다른 타입의 헤드가 있는 게 마음에 듭니다. 작은 솔은 꼼꼼히 칫솔질할 때 유용할 것 같고, 바르기 좋은 제형의 치약은 너무 끈적하지 않아서 좋습니다! 치석이 좀 있는데, 이걸로 매일 열심히 양치해보겠습니다!!!!
reviews.content_en: First of all, I love that there are different types of heads on both ends. The smaller bristles should be useful for thorough brushing, and the toothpaste formula is easy to apply and not too sticky at all! I have some tartar buildup, so I'll try brushing diligently with this every day!!!!

reviews.name: W****
reviews.content: 지금까지는 실리콘 손가락칫솔을 썼어요 플라스틱 칫솔쓰다 애 입을 찌를것같아서요 근데 오히려 이렇게 긴  칫솔을쓰니 속시원하게 닦을수있어서 좋아요 좁은 칫솔은 젤 치석이 닦기어려운곳에 집중공격하기 좋아서 아주 만족합니다~
reviews.content_en: Until now I was using a silicone finger toothbrush because I was worried about scratching my baby's mouth with a plastic one. But actually, using this longer toothbrush lets me clean really thoroughly, and I'm very satisfied! The narrow toothbrush is great for concentrated attacks on hard-to-reach tartar spots~

reviews.name: 뚜****
reviews.content:
어릴때부터 관리해 줘야 한다는 이야기를 들었지만 실제로 안좋아하는 냐옹친구들을 많이 봐서 걱정반 그렇다고 관리를 안해줄 수 없어 고민반이었는데 그런 걱정 왜 했나 싶어요 ! 
일단 친해지게 하기 위해서 칫솔 먼저 들이 밀었고 아가가 좋아하는 초유가루와 함께 친해지는 연습을 몇일 하고 난 후 어제 첫 양치를 시켰습니다 ! 
치약냄새에 도망가면 어쩌나 했는데 생각보다 너무 좋아해주고 양치도 맛있게 하는 것 같은 기분이 들어서 진짜 놀랬어요 :) 잘 관리해서 튼튼하고 건강한 냥이가 될게요 !! 
#체험단_이벤트 성공적 𖤐
reviews.content_en: I heard that you need to manage their teeth from a young age, but I saw so many cats that didn't like it that I was half worried and half unsure about whether to manage their teeth at all. Now I'm wondering why I was so concerned! First, I introduced the toothbrush to get them familiar with it, and practiced getting comfortable with it alongside some colostrum powder that my baby loves. After a few days of practice, I had them brush their teeth for the first time yesterday! I was so worried they'd run away from the toothpaste smell, but they loved it way more than expected and seemed to be enjoying brushing, so I was really shocked :) I'll take good care of their teeth so they grow up strong and healthy!! #SampleEvent_Success 𖤐

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
둘째가 이갈이를 앞두고 있어 치약칫솔 고민중이었는데 체험단으로 선정돼 체험해보니 너무 좋아요 !

🧪 치약 (냉장보관 추천) #데일리냥치
1️⃣ 제형 : 투명한 젤 제형으로 집사들 바르는 알로엘 젤 같이 생겼어요. 많이 끈적하지 않고, 그렇다고 줄줄 흐르는 것도 아니에요
2️⃣ 냄새 : 은은한 닭고기향이 나는데 음 괜찮은 냄새다 정도. 기존에 사용 중인 치약은 츄르보다 진한 맛있는 냄새라 기호성은 엄청나게 좋지만, 이거 과연 치카 되는게 맞을까 싶었는데. 데일리냥치는 치약 맞나보다 하는 느낌이에요
3️⃣ 기호성 : 저희집 애기들은 냄새 스윽 맡더니 치약만 춉춉 먹을 정도로 기호성 좋아요. 츄르인가 할 정도로 재빠른 혀놀림

🪥 칫솔 #치카푸
1️⃣ 디자인 : 전체적으로 각이 지지 않고 둥글둥글, 손에 촥 감겨 그립감도 굉장히 좋아요
2️⃣ 구성 : 집사들 사용하는 일반 칫솔과 같은 ✔️스퀘어 헤드, 이빨 사이 구석구석 닦을 수 있는 ✔️돔 헤드. 듀얼헤드로 구성되어 있어요. 기존에 쓰고 있는 페** 칫솔과 비교했을 때 돔헤드는 눈에 보이는 것처럼 확실히 작고, 스퀘어 헤드는 조금 더 커요.
3️⃣ 칫솔모 : 새 칫솔이라 혹시 몰라 사용하기 전에 제 손등에 칫솔모를 비벼 봤는데 억세다거나 거칠다는 느낌은 거의 없었어요. 우리 아가 잇몸 상할 걱정없이 열심히 치카치카 하기로
reviews.content_en:
My second one is about to start teething, and I was wondering about toothpaste and toothbrush options. I was selected as a tester and tried it out, and it's amazing!

🧪 Toothpaste (Refrigeration recommended) #DAILY NYANGCHI
1️⃣ Texture: It's a clear gel formula that looks like the aloe gel humans use. It's not too sticky, but it doesn't run everywhere either
2️⃣ Smell: It has a subtle chicken flavor - it smells decent. My existing toothpaste has a much stronger, more delicious flavor like a Churu treat, so the palatability is incredible, but I wasn't sure if that was actually doing the job. DAILY NYANGCHI feels like an actual toothpaste
3️⃣ Palatability: My babies just smelled it and started lapping up just the toothpaste - their palatability is great. Their tongues move so fast I'd think it was a Churu treat!

🪥 Toothbrush #CHIKA PU
1️⃣ Design: The overall shape is rounded with no sharp angles, and it fits perfectly in my hand with a great grip
2️⃣ Configuration: It has a ✔️square head like a regular human toothbrush, and a ✔️dome head for cleaning between teeth and in tight corners. It's a dual-head design. Compared to the pet** toothbrush I was using, the dome head is noticeably smaller as expected, and the square head is a bit larger
3️⃣ Bristles: Since it's a new toothbrush, I rubbed the bristles on the back of my hand before using it, and they felt neither stiff nor rough. I can brush my baby's teeth confidently without worrying about gum damage!

reviews.content:
뒤늦게 양치의 중요성을 알아서 최근에 양치 시키려고 이것 저것 여러개 구매해봤는데 어릴때부터 습관에 없어서 그런지 성묘에게 확실히 양치시키기 수월한건 기호성 좋은 치약이더라구요!

그래서 저는 치약을 고를때 무조건 기호성좋은 치약을 고집하는데 히끄 완벽 양치세트는 향부터 고소한 향이나요

칫솔같은 경우 애옹이들은 두가지 종류의 칫솔을 사용하는데 매번 칫솔 2개 보관하기 힘들잖아요 ^^;

간혹 애옹님 칫솔중에 저렴하긴하지만 칫솔모가 날카로운? 제품이 있는데그런제품에 비해 히끄 완벽 양치세트는 단단하면서도 부드러운 모여서 치아에 큰 부담 안가는것 같아서 만족스러워요.

하나 아쉬운점은 스퀘어 헤드 크기가 좀 크다는거..?
그럼에도 불구하고 애옹님과 저 둘다 너무 만족하는 제품입니다^0^
앞으로 히끄네로 정착할게요
reviews.content_en:
I recently realized the importance of brushing their teeth late and bought several different products to try. Since my cat didn't form the habit from a young age, I found that what really makes brushing easier for adult cats is a toothpaste with good palatability!

So when I choose toothpaste, I always insist on good palatability, and HICCUP's perfect brushing set has a savory aroma right from the start. My chicken-loving kitty is very! satisfied with it.

As for the toothbrush, my cats use two different types of brushes, but it's hard to store two toothbrushes every time, right? ^^; HICCUP's brushing set lets you use both types at once, which is so much more convenient.

Sometimes there are affordable cat toothbrushes out there with sharp bristles, but compared to those, HICCUP's perfect brushing set has firm yet soft bristles that don't put much stress on the teeth, so I'm really satisfied.

The only downside is that the square head is a bit large...? But despite that, both my kitty and I are very satisfied with this product ^0^ I'm definitely switching to HICCUP from now on!

reviews.content:

요번에 쓰고 있던 치약은 버리고
그냥 바잇미 X 히끄 치약으로 갈아타려구요~~
reviews.content_en:
[Reviewer Experience]

I've purchased BITE ME x HICCUP toothpaste before!
Back then I was a new pet parent and bought it without knowing much, but later I decided to try other toothpastes and switched brands.

After trying other products, I realized how good HICCUP toothpaste really is, and the main reason is palatability! The other products didn't have a pleasant smell even to me ㅠㅠ But this toothpaste smells delicious even when I smell it.

Second is the texture! The toothpaste I'm currently using has a sticky consistency. So when it gets on the fur during brushing, it sticks and I have to wipe it off with water after brushing—it's bothersome. And you know how kids don't cooperate with brushing...? ㅎ So when they struggle, it sticks to their whiskers and stuff, which wasn't great ㅠㅠ But this toothpaste has a liquid-like texture, like hand sanitizer, so there's less stickiness and I really like that!

Third is the toothbrush! It's 2 in 1 so it's versatile. With the larger bristles you can brush a wide area, and with the smaller bristles you can carefully brush delicate areas like the canines—that was really nice.

I'm going to throw out the toothpaste I've been using and switch to BITE ME X HICCUP toothpaste~~

reviews.content:

# 치약은 일반적인 치약제형이 아닌 슬라임?물방울떡 같은?? 느낌이에요. 그래서 양치할때 치약이 이빨에 착 달라붙는 느낌인

그래서 기존에 사용하던 다른 치약과 섞어 쓰니싸 기호성도 좋도 치약이 이빨에 밀착도 잘되서 좋았습니다^^!! 

고양이가 곧 네살이되어 이빨관리에 조금씩 더 신경을 쓰고 있는데 정말 잘 사용할것 같습니다!! 칫솔은 진짜 최고에요~
reviews.content_en:
# The 2in1 toothbrush is so convenient for pet parents to use! The large part of the brush felt a bit big at first, but once I used it, it was actually easier to brush with. And the bristles are firm, which is great for cleaning! However, for kitties with sensitive gums, it might hurt, so I'd recommend using it gently!

# The toothpaste isn't a typical toothpaste formula—it's more like slime? or mochi drops?? So when brushing, the toothpaste sticks to the teeth, and because the texture is different, the palatability seems a bit lower. So I mixed it with the other toothpaste I was using before, and it worked great—good palatability and the toothpaste adheres well to the teeth for better brushing^^!!

My cat is turning four soon and I'm gradually paying more attention to dental care. This seems like it'll be really useful! The toothbrush is seriously the best~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
이번이 네번째로 써보는 치약입니다! 사실 치약보단 칫솔을 더 꼼꼼히 고르고 있어요. 치약은 기호성 좋으면 장땡이라는 생각으로 이것저것 써보고 있고요.
일단 치약 기호성 합격 :) 사소해 보이지만 뚜껑 열고닫기 편한 일체형인 것도 마음에 들어요 (이전에 쓰던 게 다 뚜껑이 따로 놀아서 은근히 불편했어요. 양치시킬 때 가뜩이나 긴박한데!)
칫솔은 송곳니용 파츠도 잘 쓰고 있습니다. 2 in 1 유용해 보였는데 역시나!😍 다만 제 손이 작아서 그런지 칫솔 끝에서 끝이 너무 멀어서 반대쪽 쓰려고 돌릴 때 반경이 너무 커져 자꾸 고양이를 치게 되더라고요 ㅠㅠ 그 점은 불편. 하지만 칫솔모가 적당히 힘이 있어서 잘 안 상하는 점이 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: This is my fourth toothpaste! Actually, I'm more particular about choosing the toothbrush than the toothpaste. My philosophy is if the toothpaste tastes good, that's all that matters, so I try different ones. The toothpaste passes the palatability test :) It might seem small, but I also love that it's integrated so the cap is easy to open and close (my previous one had a separate cap and it was so inconvenient. When you're already in a rush during brushing!) The toothbrush works well with the canine-specific part too. The 2 in 1 looked useful, and it really is!😍 The only downside is that my hands are small, so the toothbrush is quite long, and when I try to turn it around to use the other end, the radius gets so big that I keep accidentally hitting my cat ㅠㅠ That's inconvenient. But the bristles have good firmness so they don't wear down easily, which is nice!

reviews.content_en: Since my cats are gentle, they don't resist brushing too much as long as I hold them properly! First of all, the toothbrush grip felt really good! It's light and elongated, making movements smooth during brushing, and the handle part is flat so it doesn't slip—that's great :) Since my cats have small mouths, the point brush was more convenient than the wide side! And it's made sturdy, so it doesn't seem like it'll break easily! When brushing, my cats chew on the brush like crazy...ㅋㅋ But this one is tough, so it's great :)

reviews.content:

reviews.content_en:
🌼Reviewer Experience🌼

reviews.content:

reviews.content_en:
I brush my cats' teeth every day, and honestly, it's almost like a war ^^; So a soft toothbrush and toothpaste with good palatability are important. The HICCUP brushing set I tried today is a product made together by BITE ME and HICCUP. The large brush is great for brushing the molars and gums, and the other side is perfect for brushing the gaps between the canines. The toothbrush has a bit of elasticity to it. I do wish the bristles were slightly smaller.

The toothpaste contains lactoferrin related to immunity, so it helps with oral cleanliness and preventing tartar buildup just by applying it. The formula is easy to apply and adheres evenly between the teeth, making brushing convenient. It's enhanced palatability by adding chicken flavor using food additives safe enough for humans to consume—please keep that in mind!

This review was written honestly based solely on the product received.

#BITEME #BITEME HICCUP BRUSHING SET #BITEME TOOTHPASTE #BITEME TOOTHBRUSH #CAT DENTAL CARE PRODUCTS

reviews.content_en:
[Reviewer Experience! Let me know if I should post this elsewhere.]

Since Taesub is a baby kitten, I was worried about hurting his gums so I bought a silicone bristle toothbrush, but the bristles were too soft so it didn't seem to clean well, and even though it has a chicken scent, Taesub really hates it...

I tried brushing every time he purred on my lap, but now he won't even come up on my lap anymore ㅜㅠ

I wondered if the old product was that bad, and my goal became brushing even one tooth a day... Then I got to be a HICCUP brush set reviewer!!

I thought there wouldn't be much difference, but surprisingly this product works! He cooperates much better than before!? And he smells it very interestedly! The design is so pretty and the brush is light so I like it even more ㅎㅎ Most importantly, since I'm a practical person, having different bristle types on both ends means I don't need to buy two—I can use what I need depending on the situation, which is amazing.

Since he's still a baby, I'll mainly use the small bristles for now, and once he's a bit bigger I'll use the wider side ㅎㅎㅎ

Taesub, stay healthy and keep your teeth from rotting. Let's stay happy with your teeth for a long time 🫶❤️

reviews.content_en:
I saw a 50% discount with good reviews, so I bought 9 to get through 9 months without worrying about toothbrush supply.

Recently, even the last baby tooth fell out, so we moved away from silicone toothbrushes to brushing daily. But she only eats the toothpaste and blocks or pushes the toothbrush away with her paws, making brushing time longer. Also, she chews on the bristles so I'm worried the brushing effect might be reduced.

The first toothbrush was a beginner one [brand name unclear], and it goes all the way to the innermost molars with a not-too-large head, so it feels like I'm only applying and brushing toothpaste on about one tooth at a time.

No tartar has built up yet and her teeth are still clean, so I can't tell if my brushing technique is lacking or not ;; But she hasn't bled yet, so it seems like I'm not doing too badly? Self-evaluation! 😄

That said, my mom doesn't like brushing much, so if I brush with a better toothbrush, I believe my lacking skills will be compensated by better tools ㅎㅎ

The length is about the same as existing toothbrushes. The bend point and angle of the toothbrush are similar too. Chika Poo has a dome head at the end, while the square head part is a bit wider at the bottom, and the bristles are arranged in 3 dense rows. The existing toothbrush has bristles in a 2-3-2 pattern with 3 rows, and seems to have more bristles than Chika Poo. Chika Poo has bristles arranged as 6 in the first row (vertically), 7 in the middle row, and 6 in the last row. Since the toothbrush I'm using hasn't been used for even a month yet, I'll need more time to evaluate it. Still, I'm happy to have bought a quality toothbrush at a good price!

reviews.content_en: My dog really loves the toothpaste based on his reaction ❤️ The brush head is small and reaches all the way to the molars, and having two different sizes attached is super convenient >_<

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content: 쓰고 있는 칫솔인데 저렴하게 행사해서 쟁이려고 샀어요. 큰쪽으로만 양치시키는데 저는 칫솔대가 길어서 잡기가 편하더라구요.
reviews.content_en: I've been using this toothbrush and bought it on sale. I usually brush with just the larger brush head, but I really like that the handle is long and easy to grip.

reviews.name: 함****
reviews.content: 벌써 몇개째 쓰고있어요. 총알부분으로는 어금니쪽이렁 송곳니 세심하게 닦고 큰 부분으로는 한번더 쓱싹 닦고 한개에 두개 있어서 편해요
reviews.content_en: I'm already on my second one. I use the pointed part to carefully brush the molars and canines, then do a quick brush with the larger part. It's so convenient having two brushes in one!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
칫솔 길이도 길고 치약냄새는 저한테는 별로지만
질감도 탄탄해서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: The toothbrush is long and while I'm not a fan of the toothpaste smell personally, the texture is sturdy which is nice.

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
칫솔 유목민이예요.
우리강아지는 8kg 닥스훈트라 그런지 입과 치아크기에 비해 칫솔모가 좀 작긴해요.
애가 양치를 좋아하지 않아서 후다닥 끝내야하는데, 손잡이(?)가 납작해서 닦일때 조금 불편, 돌아가긴하지만
칫솔모가 너무 부드럽지 않아서 금방 벌어지지않아 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: I'm a toothbrush nomad. My dog is an 8kg dachshund, so the bristles are a bit small compared to his mouth and tooth size. Since he doesn't like brushing, I need to finish quickly, and the flat handle is a bit uncomfortable when brushing and awkward to maneuver. But the bristles aren't too soft so they don't fray easily, which is great!

reviews.name: m****
reviews.content: 튼튼하긴 한데 사이즈가 너무 크네요.  첨에 받고서 성견용이 온 줄 알았어요.  제 고양이도 5.5킬로라 중형고양이인데 입 찟는 줄 알았네요. 걔 입이 유난히 작진 않아요.  3.8킬로 아이에겐 아예 안썼어요.  3개 사서 뜯은거 하나만 뾰족한 포인트 칫솔만 사용해야겠어요.  두개는 당근이라도 해야하려나요.  치약은 만족스러웠는데…
reviews.content_en: It's durable but the size is way too big. When I first received it, I thought it was for adult dogs. My cat is also 5.5kg, which is medium-sized, and I thought it was too big for her mouth. Her mouth isn't unusually small. I didn't use it at all for my 3.8kg kitten. I bought 3 but I think I'll only use one of the pointed toothbrushes. I'm not sure what to do with the other two... The toothpaste was satisfactory though…
